intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把活动时间表和 will be doing 的重复节奏读顺。

sentences.text: The Greenwood Boys are a group of pop singers.
sentences.focus_zh: group of pop singers 要连成一个整体，表示一个流行歌手组合。

sentences.text: At present, they are visiting all parts of the country.
sentences.focus_zh: At present 是目前；all parts of the country 是全国各地，读出巡演范围。

sentences.text: They will be arriving here tomorrow.
sentences.focus_zh: will be arriving 是把镜头放到明天，看见到达正在发生。

sentences.text: They will be coming by train and most of the young people in the town will be meeting them at the station.
sentences.focus_zh: 长句里有两个 will be doing：coming by train 和 meeting them at the station。

sentences.text: Tomorrow evening they will be singing at the Workers' Club.
sentences.focus_zh: Tomorrow evening 给出时间；Workers' Club 是本地工人俱乐部、社区活动场所。

sentences.text: The Greenwood Boys will be staying for five days.
sentences.focus_zh: will be staying for five days 读出停留五天的持续感。

sentences.text: During this time, they will give five performances.
sentences.focus_zh: During this time 承接五天；five performances 是五场演出。

sentences.text: They will be trying to keep order.
sentences.focus_zh: trying to keep order 是努力维持秩序，不是处理犯罪。
